svg.title: CORP-ENV Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Compact system architecture of corp_gym RL environment.

g.text: Role: PM / CFO / CEO · Reads SWD → reasons → chooses action
Produces <think> block before every action · tracks token budget

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the action space in corp_gym')
sendPrompt('What is the Shared Workspace Document in corp_gym?')

svg.text: Frozen worker agents (same base model, different system prompts)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does dev_agent do in corp_gym?')
sendPrompt('What does hr_agent do in corp_gym?')
sendPrompt('What does finance_agent do in corp_gym?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about task E1 in corp_gym')
sendPrompt('Tell me about task M1 in corp_gym')
sendPrompt('Tell me about task H1 in corp_gym')
sendPrompt('What does the LLM judge evaluate?')

svg.text: Penalties: −0.15 invalid JSON · −0.10 wrong agent · −0.20 budget exceeded · −0.08/missed milestone

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the server work in corp_gym?')
sendPrompt('How does the client work in corp_gym?')

svg.text: RL training: SFT (Qwen2.5-7B) → GRPO · curriculum E1 → M1 → H1 · token budget replaces max_steps
